87:
Make one? But how would we─
Ah hah! <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>, my <If(PlayerParameter(4))>girl<Else/>boy</If>, I could kiss you! Of course, the Rose Knights of Camp Cloudtop. They keep their stores of water plentiful with the spring crystals found in abundance throughout the Sea of Clouds.
